Package commands

Class Command

java.lang.Object
commands.Command
Direct Known Subclasses:
Add, AddIfMax, AddIfMin, Clear, CountLessThanDescription, Exit, FilterContainsName, FilterGreaterThanGenre, Head, Help, Info, RemoveById, Save, Script, Show, Update
public abstract class Command extends Object
Абстрактный базовый класс для всех команд
